The is_fault_adjacent field indicates whether this mutant is adjacent to a fault. In other words, whether the surrounding code has bugs that could cause this mutant's change to have unintended consequences.

In this case, changing the condition from checking both offsets to always false might not be the intended behavior. It probably should only return UTC when both are zero, but now it never does. This could lead to incorrect DateTimeZone instances being created, which would affect tests that rely on correct time zone handling.
